treatment_information.specific_treatment: laparoscopic proctocolectomy with J-pouch and diverting ileostomy
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient has recovered from this procedure well.
No improvement in symptoms while on prednisone.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted with symptoms of ulcerative colitis flare.
Initial treatment with budesonide started; no improvement.
Changed to prednisone 40 mg daily; symptoms persisted.
ED visit received IV HYDROmorphone and IV Ondansetron.
IV solumedrol initiated based on GI consultation.
Underwent laparoscopic proctocolectomy with J-pouch and diverting ileostomy.
Discharged home with service after recovery.

patient_outcome.final_status: In recovery and ready to return home.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Pathology results to be reviewed at follow-up appointment.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Patient expected to have a quick return to life and usual activities.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient has tolerated a regular diet and is passing gas.
